name: Minimum Integer After K Swaps
description:
Given a string num representing a non-negative integer and an integer k, return the minimum possible integer you can obtain after at most k adjacent swaps of digits.

The strategy is Greedy: for each position in the number, we look ahead up to k positions to find the smallest possible digit. If we find a smaller digit, we bubble it up to the current position using adjacent swaps, reducing k by the number of swaps performed.
